clang-format.style: { BasedOnStyle: Google, BreakBeforeBraces: Never, IndentWidth: 4, ColumnLimit: 0, AlwaysBreakTemplateDeclarations: No, SpacesInParentheses: false, SpaceBeforeParens: Never, SpaceAfterCStyleCast: false, AllowShortBlocksOnASingleLine: Always, AllowShortStatementsOnASingleLine: Always, AllowShortLoopsOnASingleLine: Always, KeepEmptyLinesAtTheStartOfBlocks: true, BinPackArguments: false, BinPackParameters: false }
